comments.body:
**Glossary term spanning a sentence split boundary is silently dropped.**

extractGlossary receives full paragraph strings; anchorGlossary searches within sentences.

_Suggestion:_ Log a warning when a term cannot be located in any sentence.

_(confidence 62)_
